bird.name: 褐头山雀
bird.summary: 褐头山雀（学名：Poecile montanus）为山雀科高山山雀属的鸟类，俗稱唧唧鬼子。主要分布於整個歐亞大陸的溫帶地區，一般生活于针叶林或针阔混交林。该物种的模式产地在瑞士格勞賓登州的山地森林。 亚种 褐頭山雀東歐亞種（學名：Poecile montanus boreali…

relations.subject: 褐头山雀
relations.evidence: | date=2019 | title=The Breeding Bird Survey 2018 | url=https://www.bto.org/sites/default/files/bbs-report-2018.pdf | series=BTO Research Report 717 | publisher=British Trust for Ornithology | location=Thetford | isbn=978-1-912642-05-2}} The rapid decline is believed be due to three factors: habitat loss, competition for nest holes by other tits particularly blue tits, and nest predation by the great spotted woodpecker.{{Cite journal | last=Siriwardena | first=Gavin M
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
